channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The quiet comeback of boring computing: why ports, keyboards, and repairability matter again
item.description: After years of sealed laptops, replaceable parts are finally making a comeback in 2026.

item.title: Infrared tech is decades old – why does almost every TV remote use it?
item.description: Bluetooth may seem the obvious next step in the remote's evolution, but there are reasons that infrared hasn't died out.

item.title: Orchid is a delightfully retro and approachable hipster synth
item.description: In 2017, I bought an old Magnus chord organ off Craigslist for $10. It's one of my favorite music gear purchases. Electric chord organs let you play full chords with just a press of a button, making them perfect for aspiring singer-songwriters or fooling around at home. But chord organs largely fell out of favor […]

item.title: Rien que pour le Hue Bridge, ce pack Philips (ampoules, Hue Go, prise et interrupteur connectés), soldé à -54 %, vaut le coup
item.description: Ce pack Découverte version 2025 estampillé Philips Hue contient tout ce qu'il faut pour démarrer une solide installation connectée dans votre domicile. Il est à retrouver pour 129,99 euros au lieu de 279,99 euros sur Boulanger.

item.title: Birdfy’s solar-powered smart feeder is down to one of its best prices
item.description: Birdfy has kicked off a midyear sale, taking up to 40 percent off a range of its smart bird feeders. One of the best deals is on Netvue’s Birdfy Feeder AI-Powered Smart Bird Feeder with Camera, which has dropped to $149.99 at Birdfy and is its second-best price to date. The bundle, which includes a […]

item.title: I've spent weeks testing the Razer Hammerhead V3 HyperSpeed gaming earbuds and it's left me desperate to go back to my SteelSeries Arctis GameBuds
item.description: The Razer Hammerhead V3 HyperSpeed earbuds are a premium gaming product that fail to deliver.

item.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
National Ice Cream Day 2026 deals: Score free food from Dairy Queen, Ben & Jerrys, Target, and more
item.description: National Ice Cream Day 2026 takes place on July 15. Score free food from Dairy Queen, Ben & Jerry's, Target, and more.

item.title: Lawsuit says AI tool disproportionately places Black prisoners in maximum security in Ontario
item.description: A class action lawsuit alleges an AI risk-assessment tool used in Ontario jails disproportionately places Black prisoners in maximum security.

item.title: US Marshals arrest the Tate brothers in Miami
item.description: The manosphere influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami by US Marshals in relation to new rape and sex trafficking charges in England. According to the Associated Press, British authorities are seeking the brothers' extradition. The new charges facing Andrew Tate include seven counts of rape, three of sex trafficking, three counts […]...
